subject: HSI: omap_ssi: Fix refcount leak in ssi_probe
notes: Reused features.json and seed.c from lin-2-rep1 (deterministic per-seed inputs).

POC regenerated once: initial POC with multi-variant tp/tn/fp violated verifier-v1 count equality (release/if/return mismatch); reverted to single buggy function structurally mirroring seed slice, which passed (OK F1.acq=0 F1.rel=0 F3.goto=3 F5.ret=5 F2.if=6).
POC sha unchanged across run (no drift).

Stage 4 per-predicate work folded into Stage 5 single-shot final.ql; one assemble-refine iteration was needed to disambiguate the loop-induction variable from sibling VariableAccess in the for-init (np vs child).
Final query fires only on ssi_probe_buggy line 64 (goto out3) with child='child'; meets buggy=true, fixed=false, fp=false acceptance.
